title: Hyperliquid Challenges Wall Street with 24/7 Markets and Pre-IPO Trading
summary: Hyperliquid is expanding beyond crypto into pre-IPO markets and prediction contracts, offering 24/7 trading. This puts traditional exchanges on notice, according to a new report by FalconX.
body:
Hyperliquid, a decentralized exchange, is rapidly growing beyond its crypto roots. The platform now offers trading in pre-IPO shares, prediction markets, and 24/7 asset trading, according to a report by FalconX.

The report highlights Hyperliquid's unique decentralized architecture, which allows for continuous trading without the limitations of traditional exchanges. This includes markets for high-growth private companies and prediction contracts, which let users bet on future events.

For everyday investors, this means access to markets that were previously restricted to institutional players. Hyperliquid's 24/7 trading model also offers more flexibility compared to traditional exchanges, which typically operate during standard business hours.

The platform's expansion into pre-IPO markets is particularly notable. These markets have traditionally been the domain of venture capitalists and hedge funds. Hyperliquid's move could democratize access to these high-potential investments, potentially disrupting the status quo.

Investors should watch for further expansion into other asset classes and the platform's ability to attract liquidity. If Hyperliquid continues to grow, it could become a major player in the financial markets, challenging traditional exchanges and prediction markets alike.
twitterThread: Hyperliquid is taking on Wall Street with 24/7 trading in pre-IPO shares and prediction markets. 🚀
The decentralized exchange is expanding beyond crypto, offering continuous trading and access to high-growth private companies. Traditional exchanges are on notice.

If you're an investor, keep an eye on Hyperliquid's growth. It could disrupt traditional markets. Read more → https://cryptocatalyst.news/articles/2026-05-25-hyperliquid-challenges-wall-street-with-247-markets-and-pre-ipo-trading
